title: pergularia exilis
intro: Pergularia exilis, also known as Indian arrowroot or Bael, is a perennial plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pergularia exilis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Pergularia exilis is often used to make teas, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
